description: A quarterly CIS Kubernetes Benchmark scan has flagged four workloads in the 'compliance-apps' namespace for violating the organization's container security baseline. Each deployment has a distinct security context violation. Remediate all violations according to the security policy at /home/ga/Desktop/container_security_baseline.md while keeping all pods in a healthy Running state. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
